task:
/create_plan the @apps/app/src/components/command-palette.tsx and @packages/ui/src/components/ui/command.tsx has a keyboard shortcut bug.

basically only cmd + k should open the command dialog.

right now the movement is meant to be ctrl + j/k.

ctrl k closes it too.

note this is for mac.

ensure you solution fixes the root problem and fixes it for both windows + maco
